Its primary business purpose is to streamline and facilitate the deployment process by specifying the necessary resources and parameters required for local development and testing, thus enhancing developer productivity and maintaining consistency in the deployment workflow.

The module "legacy_edx_certificate_revision_mapping.csv" serves the business purpose of mapping various revisions of certificates issued within the legacy EdX platform to their corresponding identifiers or attributes. This facilitates the accurate tracking, retrieval, and management of certificate data for reporting and integration with other systems, ensuring that historical information is preserved and accessible for user validation and compliance.
